title: Kaido Descends on Wano
description: On pages 10–13, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Beast Pirates, Garp, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12 as The truth of the Kozuki retainers and Wano’s time-displaced rebellion is revealed as Kaido’s power closes in.
scene: Kaido appears in dragon form and turns the Wano rebellion into an immediate confrontation.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: We need to treat her immedi- ately....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We're too out in the open. Let's head into the forest.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How could he do this to such a young child...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: News of LuffTaro's Scuffle in Kuri...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: has spread throughout the wano country...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I wonder if he made it to wano coun...

dialogue.speaker: Garp
dialogue.text: Oh, my! Luffy has arrived in wan...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh, a Samural named Luffytaro and Master Kaido...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Also, you're eating too much!! Are you actually able to pay for all of this!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: THE NEXT DAY... WANO COUNTRY- UDON

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Beat it, beat it!! Beat the iron!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The harder and stronger the weapons you make are... the more the capital will prosper!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: YOUR LIVES BELONG TO LORD OROCH!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: If you want to continue to live...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you want to rest, we'll kill you!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: No idea. Our orders were to...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "Give it one poison-ous fish per day... with the bones removed."

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We usually use the poisonous fish when we're trying to kill someone, but it seems that whatever's in there is still alive.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Is it a croco-shark or something? Why do we have to treat it nicely and remove the bones....!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So that's him... the man who went against Master Kaido...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: and who went on a huge rampage, destroying the town in the process....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I thought he'd at least be as big as an all-star...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: The way you're looking at me....!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll make you lose the shine in your eyes in no time!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: What's this!? He's glaring at us guards!!

summary: This section advances the Wano Country - Kozuki Secret storyline with 52 dialogue beats. Kaido’s arrival turns the rebellion from a secret plan into a brutal confrontation.
